title: Intros under --faithful may under-fill rooms (wideners off; camera-seed walk relies on them)
repro: boot an intro under --faithful and compare admitted-room set vs default mode at swirl frames (same-class as FID-0008: visibility-supplement/wideners disabled under --faithful; FID-0009's draw-only camera-seed walk may not cover supplement-dependent rooms)

history.note: Filed per the FID-0008 review (I3): same-class player-visible gap suspected, unverified — the FID-0008 fix runs the supplement draw-only under --faithful for gameplay, but intro paths take the frustum-fallback early-returns. Needs a --faithful intro sweep across the 20 intro routes.
